pattern_compliance.file_organization: pass - app/(home), app/docs, content/docs, lib/, components/
pattern_compliance.naming_consistency: pass - Portuguese slugs, consistent meta.json structure

quality_check.error_handling: notFound() used correctly in docs page

suggestions.description: Icon SVG uses purple-blue gradient (#7B5DFF to #29B6F6) while the site theme is green (#66cc8a). Consider updating the icon to match the green branding.

Link '[plano Pro](/docs/referencia/modulos-clinicos)' points to the clinical modules page which doesn't contain Pro plan information. Consider linking to a dedicated pricing/plans page or the Sobre page.

All Portuguese content uses ASCII-only (no accents: 'e' instead of 'e with accent', 'cao' instead of proper accented form). While consistent, adding proper Portuguese diacritics would improve professionalism for a user-facing documentation site.
Keyboard shortcuts page is minimal (only 4 shortcuts). Consider expanding as the app matures, or adding a note about which shortcuts are available per module.
No lint script configured. Consider adding ESLint for future content/code quality checks.
